shell.tagline: Understand how public money is used
shell.footer: Open data (Licence Ouverte / Etalab 2.0). Code under AGPL-3.0.
shell.footerDescription: Cartographie des Fonds Publics reuses open public data to make the links, funding and mandates of French institutions legible.

methodology.doubleCounting: Heads up: the same euro can be counted more than once (a State subsidy, then the operator's spend). Totals are orders of magnitude, never consolidated sums.
methodology.mixed: Heads up: this total mixes different accounting universes (State LOLF, local authorities M57/M14). They are not consolidatable — an order of magnitude, not a sum.
methodology.local: Local accounting (M57/M14, cash basis): no AE/CP or voted/executed split as for the State, and not consolidatable with State credits.
